summary: OCB TITAN ERP - P1 Transaction Integration Testing (Iteration 51). All features tested and working. Backend: 14/14 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All key features verified - Pricing Engine APIs, Price Level lookup, Owner Edit buttons visible and functional in Sales List, Master Items, and Purchase Orders.

issues: POS page is at /kasir not /pos - POS.jsx imported but route is 'kasir'

BACKEND_PRICING_ENGINE.test_calculate_pricing_endpoint: PASS - POST /api/master/calculate-pricing returns items, totals, discounts

BACKEND_PRICE_LEVEL.test_price_levels_list: PASS - GET /api/master/price-levels returns price level definitions

FRONTEND_SALES_ADD.customer_select: PASS - Customer select triggers price level lookup (handleCustomerChange)
FRONTEND_SALES_ADD.totals_calculation: PASS - Sub Total, Pajak, Total Akhir displayed

FRONTEND_POS.product_search: PASS - Cari produk atau scan barcode

FRONTEND_OWNER_EDIT.sales_list_button: PASS - Owner Edit button visible in Sales List AKSI column
FRONTEND_OWNER_EDIT.master_items_button: PASS - Owner Edit button visible in Master Items AKSI column
FRONTEND_OWNER_EDIT.purchase_orders_button: PASS - Owner Edit button visible in Purchase Orders AKSI column
FRONTEND_OWNER_EDIT.modal_opens: PASS - Owner Edit modal opens with correct fields (Catatan, Potongan Rp)
FRONTEND_OWNER_EDIT.modal_warning: PASS - Warning about recalculation on stock/journal/AP-AR

context_for_next_testing_agent: P1 Transaction Integration features all verified: 1) SalesAdd.jsx has pricing engine integration (calculatePricing, handleCustomerChange for price level), 2) POS (/kasir route) has cart, customer selection, discount sections, 3) Owner Edit buttons visible and modal working for owner role in Sales List, Master Items, Purchase Orders. Note: POS is at /kasir not /pos.
